pages.text_excerpt: Media - Martin McCluskey Skip to main content Martin McCluskey Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West Join Get Involved Donate Media Newsletter Sign Up Visit Parliament How I Can Help Contact Privacy Policy More Menu Media Image: PA "This is a big moment in our work to cut energy bills." 24 January 2026 | This week, the UK Labour Government launched the Warm Homes Plan, the most ambitious programme of home energy upgrades this country has ever seen. In my role as Minister for Energy Consumers, this is a big moment in our continuing work towards cutting energy bills. Red more Image: George Munro (left), Jane Barlow/PA Wire (right) ‘The Finance Secretary’s speech did not mention Inverclyde.’ 17 January 2026 | For 19 years, SNP budgets have consistently shortchanged our area. And this week’s Scottish budget was no exception. Read more (Image: George Munro) "This is what ending austerity in the UK looks like." 10 January 2026 | For years, people across Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West have felt the consequences of Conservative UK and SNP Scottish Governments that have asked communities to do more with less. Read more Image: Liam McBurney/PA Wire 'We need to do everything we can to stay safe and healthy.' 14 December 2025 | Over the past week, worrying news about increases in a new flu strain have dominated the headlines. Cases have more than doubled in a week and we need to do everything we can to stay safe and healthy this winter. Read more Martin McCluskey Contact details Email: martin.mccluskey.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Kate Watson on behalf of Martin McCluskey, both at Donald Dewar House, 139 Norfolk St, Glasgow, G5 9EA ©2026 Copyright Martin McCluskey MP All rights reserved. pages.title: How I Can Help - Martin McCluskey
pages.meta_description: Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West
pages.text_excerpt: How I Can Help - Martin McCluskey Skip to main content Martin McCluskey Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West Join Get Involved Donate Media Newsletter Sign Up Visit Parliament How I Can Help Contact Privacy Policy More Menu How I Can Help My casework service is supported by two dedicated members of staff. We’re a small team but we work really hard to support as many people as possible, as quickly as possible. Because we receive so many requests for assistance we sometimes have to prioritise urgent cases first If your enquiry is about a personal issue (such as a housing, NHS or benefits problem) we aim to respond within 3 working days. If your email relates to a policy issue (such as a question about Government policy, asking me to support a campaign or asking my view on a particular issue, we aim to respond within 28 days. Before you get in touch it’s important that you know there is a strict Parliamentary protocol which prevents me from intervening on behalf of another MP’s constituents. So please do double check that you live in the Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West constituency and that I am your member of Parliament. Enter your postcode here to check. Martin McCluskey Contact details Email: martin.mccluskey.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Kate Watson on behalf of Martin McCluskey, both at Donald Dewar House, 139 Norfolk St, Glasgow, G5 9EA ©2026 Copyright Martin McCluskey MP All rights reserved. pages.title: About Me - Martin McCluskey
pages.meta_description: Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West
pages.text_excerpt: About Me - Martin McCluskey Skip to main content Martin McCluskey Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West Join Get Involved Donate Media Newsletter Sign Up Visit Parliament How I Can Help Contact Privacy Policy More Menu About Me I’m Martin McCluskey, Scottish Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West. I grew up in Greenock, where my family has always been part of our community – my mum worked as a nurse and midwife at Inverclyde Royal Hospital, my dad and uncle ran youth clubs in Renfrewshire, and my grandad was a union treasurer at Scott’s shipyard. At 17, I spent six months in Ghana working with a charity, an experience that really opened my eyes and confirmed my commitment to public service. I was lucky to have a great education and ended up at the University of Oxford. Before becoming an MP, I worked in the public sector, in international development with VSO UK, and later supporting charities and businesses. I was also elected as a councillor for Gourock, which gave me a real understanding of the challenges people face locally as well as the incredible strength of our communities. For just over a year after being elected, I served as an Assistant Government Whip. In September 2025, I was appointed Minister for Energy Consumers in the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero . It’s a role where I can make sure that people get a fair deal on their bills and that the benefits of cleaner, cheaper energy reach every home – something I’m passionate about for both our local area and the country. I currently live in Gourock with my husband and our dog, and I’m proud every day to represent the place I’ve always called home. Martin McCluskey with former Prime Minister Gordon Brown Martin McCluskey Contact details Email: martin.mccluskey.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Kate Watson on behalf of Martin McCluskey, both at Donald Dewar House, 139 Norfolk St, Glasgow, G5 9EA ©2026 Copyright Martin McCluskey MP All rights reserved.
